name: media-tools
description: Document conversion, vector search, financial data extraction, and PDF processing tools — powered by markitdown, turbovec, quantmind, and opendataloader-pdf

interface.shortDescription: Convert documents, build vector indexes, extract financial data, and parse PDFs
interface.longDescription:
A plugin integrating four powerful document/media processing tools:
• **markitdown** — Convert PDFs, Office docs, images, audio, HTML, EPUB to Markdown
• **turbovec** — High-performance vector ANN search with SIMD acceleration
• **quantmind** — Financial document knowledge extraction and retrieval
• **opendataloader-pdf** — High-performance PDF text, table, and image extraction
defaultPrompt: Convert this PDF to markdown and summarize it.
Build a vector index from these documents and search for relevant passages.
Extract financial data from this earnings report PDF.
